document.source_title: UAE restores power to Barakah nuclear plant after drone strike, says IAEA – as it happened

claims.claim_text: Donald Trump postponed a planned military attack on Iran after it sent a peace proposal to Washington.
claims.evidence_text: Donald Trump said he postponed a planned military attack on Iran set for Tuesday after it sent a peace proposal to Washington.

claims.claim_text: Iran's armed forces are more prepared and stronger than in the past.
claims.evidence_text: Iran remained defiant in statements issued on state media after Trump’s announcement, warning the US and its allies against making any further 'strategic mistakes or miscalculations' in striking Iran and saying Iranian armed forces were 'more prepared and stronger than in the past'.

entities.name: Donald Trump
entities.description: President of the United States who announced the postponement of military action against Iran.
entities.evidence_text: Donald Trump said he postponed a planned military attack on Iran set for Tuesday after it sent a peace proposal to Washington.

entities.name: International Atomic Energy Agency
entities.description: Agency that reported the restoration of power to the Barakah nuclear power plant.
entities.evidence_text: Off-site power was restored to a unit of the Barakah nuclear power plant in the United Arab Emirates after the drone strike on Sunday, the International Atomic Energy Agency said it had been told by the UAE.

events.event: Donald Trump postpones military attack on Iran
events.evidence_text: Donald Trump said he postponed a planned military attack on Iran set for Tuesday after it sent a peace proposal to Washington.

events.event: Restoration of power to Barakah nuclear plant
events.evidence_text: Off-site power was restored to a unit of the Barakah nuclear power plant in the United Arab Emirates after the drone strike on Sunday.

metrics.name: Brent crude oil price
metrics.evidence_text: The price for Brent crude – the international standard – went from a high of $112 a barrel overnight to below $107 in the morning before turning back higher, and after settling at $112.10.

citations.title: UAE restores power to Barakah nuclear plant after drone strike, says IAEA – as it happened

source_credibility.reason: The source is a reputable news organization providing live updates on significant geopolitical events.
